title: Declare exception types as public
messageFormat: Make this exception type public so callers can catch it specifically.
summary: An exception that escapes an assembly but is declared internal (or otherwise non-public) cannot be named in a catch clause by the calling code. Consumers are forced to catch a broader base type, losing the ability to react to the specific failure.
Make any exception that can reach external callers public, or keep it private only if it is always caught within the same assembly.
